# llms-full.txt — Complete Site Content for AI Systems
# Autitude - Desenvolvimento e Ação Humana
# https://autitude.com.br

This file contains the complete, structured content of the Autitude website for AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, etc.) to index and reference.

---

## ABOUT THE CLINIC

Autitude Desenvolvimento e Ação Humana is a multidisciplinary clinic specialized in neurodivergent care, located in Pindamonhangaba-SP, Brazil. Founded over 20 years ago, the clinic serves children, adolescents, adults and their families with a humanized, integrative and evidence-based approach.

**Mission:** Cuidamos de pessoas. Potencializamos possibilidades. (We care for people. We empower possibilities.)

**Brand Pillars:**
1. Acolher (Welcome) — Receive each family with listening, respect and presence.
2. Compreender (Understand) — Investigate each person's unique profile based on evidence.
3. Desenvolver (Develop) — Empower abilities with integral and individualized care.
4. Incluir (Include) — Build paths of participation and belonging in every context.

---

## SERVICES

### 1. Neuropsicologia (Neuropsychology)
- Complete neuropsychological assessment
- Neurodivergence screening (ASD, ADHD, learning disabilities)
- Cognitive, emotional and behavioral development
- Family guidance and support
- Individualized neuropsychological profiling

### 2. Neuropsicopedagogia (Neuropsychopedagogy)
- Learning difficulty assessment
- Pedagogical challenge identification
- Individualized pedagogical planning and application
- School development support
- Personalized teaching strategies

### 3. Fonoaudiologia (Speech Therapy)
- Oral and written language development
- Social communication and pragmatic skills
- Speech and orofacial motricity
- Specialized care for neurodivergence
- Intervention in speech and language disorders

### 4. Terapia Ocupacional (Occupational Therapy)
- Assessment and intervention in Sensory Integration
- International certification in Sensory Integration (University of Southern California — USC, USA)
- Autonomy development
- Socialization and social skills
- Coping with daily life challenges
- Functional independence promotion

### 5. Terapia ABA Humanizada (Humanized ABA Therapy)
- Applied Behavior Analysis
- Adaptive skill development
- Reduction of challenging behaviors
- Evidence-based teaching
- Humanized and respectful approach

---

## KEY TREATMENTS & FOCUS AREAS

- **Autism Spectrum (TEA/ASD):** Integrated care with ABA, sensory integration, speech therapy, occupational therapy. Both children and adults.
- **ADHD (TDAH):** Neuropsychological assessment, regulation strategies, learning support.
- **Learning Disabilities:** Dyslexia, dysgraphia, dyscalculia, auditory processing disorder. Assessment and intervention.
- **Sensory Integration:** International USC certification. Assessment and treatment of sensory processing differences.
- **Speech & Language:** Language development, social communication, orofacial motricity.
- **Emotional Regulation:** Strategies for children and adolescents with meltdown management, self-regulation support.
- **Social Skills:** Training in social interaction for neurodivergent individuals.
- **Family Therapy:** Support for families of neurodivergent individuals.
- **Inclusive Education:** School adaptation, curricular modifications, teacher guidance.
- **Adult Neurodivergence:** Late autism diagnosis, adult occupational therapy, cognitive rehabilitation.

---

## FAQ — COMMON QUESTIONS

**Q: What is Autitude?**
A: Autitude is a specialized clinic for children, adolescents, adults and their families, focused on neurodivergent individuals. Our approach is transdisciplinary, humanized and evidence-based.

**Q: What age do you serve?**
A: We serve children, adolescents, adults and their families. Care can begin in the first years of life.

**Q: How long is each session?**
A: Sessions last 45-60 minutes depending on the type of intervention. Initial assessments are longer.

**Q: Does the family participate?**
A: Yes. Family is essential to care. We provide guidance and work in partnership.

**Q: What is neurodivergence?**
A: Neurodivergence recognizes variations in brain functioning, such as ASD, ADHD, dyslexia, among others. Each neurodivergent person has a unique profile.

**Q: How do I know if my child needs evaluation?**
A: If you notice challenges in communication, learning, behavior, emotional regulation or social interaction, a specialized assessment can help.

**Q: What is Sensory Integration?**
A: A therapeutic approach developed by Dr. Jean Ayres that works on how the brain processes sensory information, helping children organize better in relation to daily stimuli.

**Q: How does scheduling work?**
A: Contact us via WhatsApp or fill out the form. We respond within 24 hours.

**Q: Do you accept insurance?**
A: We work with some insurance plans and private options. Contact us to check your plan.

**Q: Where are you located?**
A: Rua Major José dos Santos Moreira, 328 — Vila Rica, Pindamonhangaba-SP. In-person by appointment, plus online guidance for other regions.

---

## BLOG TAGS (28 SEO Pages)

### Tier 1 — Primary Services
- /blog/terapia-ocupacional-infantil — Infant occupational therapy, sensory integration, autonomy
- /blog/integracao-sensorial — Sensory integration, USC certification, sensory processing
- /blog/neuropsicologia-infantil — Child neuropsychology, cognitive assessment, neurodivergence screening
- /blog/neuropsicopedagogia — Neuropsychopedagogy, learning difficulties, pedagogical plans
- /blog/fonoaudiologia-infantil — Child speech therapy, language development, communication
- /blog/autismo-terapia — Autism therapy, ASD, integrated care, ABA
- /blog/tdah-tratamento — ADHD treatment, attention, regulation, learning

### Tier 2 — Related Therapies
- /blog/terapia-aba — ABA therapy, applied behavior analysis, adaptive skills
- /blog/dificuldades-aprendizagem — Learning difficulties, dyslexia, dysgraphia, dyscalculia
- /blog/desenvolvimento-infantil — Child development, milestones, early stimulation
- /blog/neurodivergencia — Neurodivergence overview, neurodiversity, types
- /blog/deficiencia-aprendizagem — Learning disabilities, reading/writing/calculation disorders

### Tier 3 — Clinical & Diagnostic
- /blog/laudo-neuropsicologico — Neuropsychological report, diagnostic documentation
- /blog/avaliacao-desenvolvimento — Developmental assessment, early evaluation
- /blog/autismo-adulto — Adult autism, late diagnosis, self-knowledge
- /blog/ansiedade-infantil — Childhood anxiety, TAG, school phobia

### Tier 4 — Daily Life & Support
- /blog/regulacao-emocional — Emotional regulation, meltdowns, self-regulation
- /blog/habilidades-sociais — Social skills, social interaction training
- /blog/alimentacao-neurodivergencia — Selective eating, sensory food sensitivity
- /blog/exercicios-fisicos — Physical exercise, adapted sports, motor skills
- /blog/sono-neurodivergencia — Sleep disorders, insomnia in ASD/ADHD
- /blog/brincadeira-desenvolvimento — Play and development, play therapy

### Tier 5 — Family & Social
- /blog/terapia-familiar — Family therapy, neurodivergent family support
- /blog/acolhimento-familia — Family support, support groups, caregiver well-being
- /blog/inclusao-social — Social inclusion, participation, citizenship
- /blog/comunicacao-alternativa — AAC, alternative communication, communication boards
- /blog/escola-inclusiva — Inclusive schools, curricular adaptation
- /blog/terapia-ocupacional-adulto — Adult occupational therapy, cognitive rehabilitation

- **Hours:** Monday to Friday, 8h-18h

---

## TECHNOLOGY & SEO

- Built with Nuxt 3 (Vue 3), static site generation
- PWA with offline support
- JSON-LD structured data on every page
- Full Open Graph + Twitter Card meta
- XML Sitemap with all 36 URLs
- robots.txt allows all crawlers including AI (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, etc.)
- Accessibility: skip links, ARIA labels, high-contrast modes
- Color themes: light, dark, sepia
